attack_mutations.title: Raw payload material is introduced into the payload boundary
Malformed payload structure is accepted as modeled categorical intake
Raw signature or transaction blob material is introduced
Signing is allowed before auth decision
Review decision is removed before authorization and signing
Payload is rebound to non-Testnet network metadata
Imported production account provenance is introduced
Duplicate payload resolution is accepted
Duplicate submit-result observation is accepted
Stale evidence digest is accepted for a reviewed Testnet observation
Human-reviewed evidence is downgraded to unreviewed without blocking proof consumption
Decline coverage gap is promoted to modeled runtime path
Cancellation coverage gap is promoted to modeled runtime path
Expiry coverage gap is promoted to modeled runtime path
Cancellation wins a race after submit attempt without a modeled cancellation path
Expiry wins a race after auth but before signing/submission is resolved
Reconnect is accepted before submit result observation is restored
Unsupported TrustSet semantics are accepted as proof-eligible Testnet payload semantics
Unsupported OfferCreate semantics are accepted as proof-eligible Testnet payload semantics
Unsupported SignerListSet semantics are accepted as proof-eligible Testnet payload semantics
Path payment semantics are skipped while retaining a modeled-payment proof decision
Forged broadcast/finality proof is accepted as modeled evidence
Unknown solver result is tampered into a proved result
Unknown proof obligation status is forged into a proof result
Submit result observation is removed from the trace

cases.title: Reviewed Testnet lifecycle trace remains accepted

cases.rejection_reason: duplicate trace action: payload_intake
cases.title: Duplicate action creates ambiguous reviewed trace mapping

cases.rejection_reason: duplicate trace ordinal: 1
cases.title: Duplicate ordinal creates ambiguous reviewed trace mapping

cases.rejection_reason: trace event count changed
cases.title: Signing event is reordered before auth decision

cases.rejection_reason: action payload_intake is not reviewed UI evidence
cases.title: Unreviewed source-derived event tries to enter the model

cases.rejection_reason: action payload_intake retained raw material
cases.title: Trace event records raw material flag

cases.rejection_reason: redaction breach rejected at $.events[0].<sensitive-redacted-field>
cases.title: Trace event attempts to retain a sensitive raw payload field

cases.rejection_reason: coverage gaps must remain exactly decline, cancel, and expiry
cases.title: Cancellation coverage gap is silently dropped

cases.rejection_reason: network binding must remain XRPL Testnet key TESTNET with network_id 1
cases.title: Trace is rebound away from XRPL Testnet

cases.rejection_reason: imported or production account boundary rejected
cases.title: Trace imports a production account boundary

cases.rejection_reason: action submit_result category or outcome changed
cases.title: Submit result categorical outcome is changed
Reviewed Testnet SecurityModelIR parses as trusted baseline

cases.rejection_reason: Unknown top-level SecurityModelIR field(s): forged
cases.title: Unknown top-level field is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: Missing required top-level SecurityModelIR field(s): model_id
cases.title: Missing model_id is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: events must be a list in SecurityModelIR payload
cases.title: Non-list events field is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: events[0] must be a dict in SecurityModelIR payload
cases.title: Non-mapping event entry is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: Duplicate claim id: xaman-testnet-claim:network-binding-is-testnet-only
cases.title: Duplicate claim id is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: claim xaman-testnet-claim:network-binding-is-testnet-only references unknown security domain 'unknown_domain'; mark it custom=True to model a domain outside PRODUCTION_SECURITY_DOMAINS/XAMAN_SECURITY_DOMAINS
cases.title: Unknown claim domain without custom flag is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: proof_obligation xaman-testnet-obligation:network-binding-is-testnet-only has unsupported status: PROVEN_BY_ASSERTION
cases.title: Invalid proof obligation status is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: solver_result xaman-testnet-solver-result:network-binding-is-testnet-only has unsupported result value: proved
cases.title: Invalid solver result is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: Unsupported prover targets: magic-solver
cases.title: Unsupported prover target is rejected

cases.rejection_reason: runtime_trace xaman-testnet-runtime-trace:transaction-lifecycle-reviewed references unknown event id: missing-event
cases.title: Runtime trace referencing unknown event is rejected

coverage_statement.description: The campaign covers deterministic generated mutations over the reviewed XRPL Testnet trace and selected categorical wallet input classes. It is not a claim over all possible wallet inputs or production runtime behavior.
